metadata.purpose: Documentation taxonomy and concept registry for XAF knowledge management

concepts.name: Application Model
concepts.description: Metadata-driven configuration system that defines XAF application UI structure and behavior

concepts.name: Model Cache
concepts.description: Application Model caching system for improved startup performance

concepts.name: Model Differences
concepts.description: Layer-based storage system for Application Model customizations (Module, Administrator, User levels)

concepts.name: Model Extension
concepts.description: Programmatic extension of Application Model using IModelExtender interface and ExtendModelInterfaces method

concepts.name: Model Nodes
concepts.description: Configuration tree elements in the Application Model

concepts.name: ApplicationBuilder
concepts.description: Fluent API pattern for configuring XAF applications

concepts.name: Web API Service
concepts.description: Headless backend service exposing OData/REST endpoints for CRUD operations, authentication, and data access from non-XAF clients

concepts.name: XAF Application
concepts.description: Main XAF application class that manages Controllers, Views, Object Space, and application lifecycle

concepts.name: Dependency Injection
concepts.description: Inversion of Control pattern for managing dependencies and registering services

concepts.name: Modules
concepts.description: Modular components that add functionality to XAF applications

concepts.name: Multi-Tenancy
concepts.description: Multiple customer/organization support in single application

concepts.name: Tenant
concepts.description: Individual customer or organization in multi-tenant system

concepts.name: Business Object
concepts.description: Domain entities that represent business data and logic in XAF applications

concepts.name: Business Object Lifecycle
concepts.description: Lifecycle methods called automatically when business objects are created, loaded, or saved (IXafEntityObject for EF Core, AfterConstruction/OnSaving for XPO)

synonyms: Custom logic within a data Model

concepts.name: Clone Object
concepts.description: Module for duplicating business objects

concepts.name: Custom Validation Rules
concepts.description: Implementing custom validation rule types

concepts.name: Non-persistent Object
concepts.description: In-memory objects not mapped to the database, managed via NonPersistentObjectSpace for transient UI data and DTOs

concepts.name: State Machine
concepts.description: Workflow engine for managing object state transitions

concepts.name: Tree Node Interface
concepts.description: Implementing ITreeNode for hierarchical tree structures

concepts.name: Validation
concepts.description: Business rules and data validation framework

concepts.name: Optimistic Locking
concepts.description: Optimistic concurrency control with automatic merge strategies for handling concurrent data modifications

concepts.name: Built-in Criteria Operators
concepts.description: Built-in operator functions for criteria expressions (date functions, security functions, etc.)

concepts.name: Criteria
concepts.description: Filter expression language system for querying and filtering data

concepts.name: Custom Criteria Functions
concepts.description: Custom operator implementation using ICustomFunctionOperator interface

concepts.name: Database Connection
concepts.description: Database connection configuration and management

concepts.name: Direct SQL
concepts.description: Executing direct SQL queries outside ORM

concepts.name: Multiple Databases
concepts.description: Connecting to and managing multiple databases simultaneously

concepts.name: Async Operations
concepts.description: Asynchronous Object Space methods and thread-safety patterns for non-blocking data access

concepts.name: Business Logic
concepts.description: Implementing custom business logic and data manipulation through the Object Space API for CRUD operations, queries, and transactions

concepts.name: Object Space
concepts.description: ORM-independent abstraction for data access, implementing Repository and Unit of Work patterns for CRUD operations and change tracking

concepts.name: Object Space Provider
concepts.description: Factory for creating Object Space instances

concepts.name: Entity Framework Core
concepts.description: Microsoft's ORM for object-relational mapping, database provider management, and change tracking in XAF applications

concepts.name: XPO
concepts.description: DevExpress ORM for object-relational mapping, session management, and data layer operations in XAF applications

concepts.name: Auto-Increment Fields
concepts.description: Implementing auto-incrementing sequential number fields

concepts.name: Calculated Property
concepts.description: Property whose value is calculated from other properties

concepts.name: Collection Property
concepts.description: Property representing a collection of related objects

concepts.name: File Attachments
concepts.description: Module for attaching and managing files

concepts.name: Property Metadata
concepts.description: Metadata-driven property customization including aliased fields, calculated fields, and custom fields added via Model Editor or attributes

concepts.name: Reference Property
concepts.description: Property representing a reference to a single related object

concepts.name: Object Relationships
concepts.description: Relationship types and configurations between business objects (One-to-Many, Many-to-Many, aggregated vs non-aggregated)

concepts.name: Database Update
concepts.description: Database schema updates and initial data seeding

concepts.name: Culture-Specific Formatting
concepts.description: Number, date, and currency formatting based on the current culture settings

concepts.name: Localization Basics
concepts.description: Foundational localization concepts: Application Model Localization node, language aspects, localizable properties, and language selection

concepts.name: Localization Tool
concepts.description: Visual IDE tool for translating XAF applications via the Model Editor, with CSV import/export and Microsoft Translator integration

concepts.name: Programmatic Localization
concepts.description: Implementing localization programmatically in code

concepts.name: Runtime Language Switcher
concepts.description: UI component that allows end users to change the application language at runtime without restarting

concepts.name: Satellite Assemblies
concepts.description: Pre-built translation assemblies for standard XAF modules and DevExpress controls, distributed via the Localization Service or Product Installer

concepts.name: Legacy .NET Framework
concepts.description: Deprecated .NET Framework versions and platforms

concepts.name: Migration
concepts.description: Upgrading from older XAF or .NET versions

concepts.name: Deployment
concepts.description: Application deployment strategies and configurations

concepts.name: Scaling Architecture
concepts.description: Architectural patterns for scaling to hundreds or thousands of users

concepts.name: Diagnostic Tools
concepts.description: XAF diagnostic and tracing tools for debugging

concepts.name: Logging
concepts.description: Application logging and diagnostics

concepts.name: Memory Management
concepts.description: Memory optimization and troubleshooting memory issues

concepts.name: Performance Optimization
concepts.description: Performance improvement techniques and patterns

concepts.name: Testing
concepts.description: Testing frameworks and strategies

concepts.name: Audit Trail
concepts.description: Module for tracking changes to business objects

concepts.name: Authentication
concepts.description: User identity verification and login management system

concepts.name: Authorization
concepts.description: Permission-based access control system for managing user roles and data access rights

concepts.name: Permission Policies
concepts.description: Fine-grained permission rules for types, objects, and members

concepts.name: Middle Tier
concepts.description: Secure frontend-backend communication architecture

concepts.name: Security System
concepts.description: Comprehensive XAF security framework integrating authentication, authorization, and data access control

concepts.name: Custom User Management
concepts.description: Implementing custom user and role classes

concepts.name: Model Editor
concepts.description: Visual tool for viewing and customizing the Application Model at design-time and runtime

concepts.name: Assembly References
concepts.description: Troubleshooting missing assemblies and resource references

concepts.name: Package Management
concepts.description: Managing NuGet packages and dependencies

concepts.name: Project Wizards
concepts.description: Legacy Visual Studio wizards for creating and configuring XAF projects (replaced by Template Kit)

concepts.name: Template Kit
concepts.description: Cross-IDE project scaffolding tool for creating XAF applications and adding items (Visual Studio, Rider, VS Code)

concepts.name: Action Container View Items
concepts.description: View items that display action containers within detail view layouts

concepts.name: Action Containers
concepts.description: Where actions appear in the UI (toolbar, menu, navigation, ribbon)

synonyms: Access Actions in Different UI Areas

concepts.name: Action Customization
concepts.description: Customizing action appearance, behavior, and properties

concepts.name: Action State Management
concepts.description: Managing action visibility, enabled state, and activation logic

concepts.name: Action Types
concepts.description: Core action implementation classes and patterns

concepts.name: Actions
concepts.description: Parent concept for all action-related functionality (user interactions and commands)

concepts.name: Built-in Actions
concepts.description: Pre-built actions provided by System Module and other XAF modules

concepts.name: Parametrized Action
concepts.description: Action that accepts user input parameters

concepts.name: Popup Window Show Action
concepts.description: Action that displays a popup window or dialog with a view

concepts.name: Simple Action
concepts.description: Basic button or command action without parameters

concepts.name: Single Choice Action
concepts.description: Action with a dropdown menu of predefined choices

concepts.name: Built-in Controllers
concepts.description: Standard controllers provided by XAF System Module and feature modules

concepts.name: CRUD Controllers
concepts.description: Controllers handling Create, Read, Update, Delete operations

concepts.name: Controller Activation
concepts.description: Defining when and where controllers activate using target properties

concepts.name: Controller Customization
concepts.description: Creating and customizing controllers to implement application-specific logic

concepts.name: Controller Lifecycle
concepts.description: Controller activation, deactivation, and lifecycle events

concepts.name: Controller Types
concepts.description: Core controller base classes and implementation types

concepts.name: Controllers and Actions
concepts.description: Controller classes and Action components for implementing UI commands and user interactions

concepts.name: Dialog Controller
concepts.description: Specialized controller providing Accept/Cancel actions for popup windows and modal dialogs

concepts.name: Generic View Controllers
concepts.description: Generic view controllers with type parameters for strongly-typed view access

concepts.name: List View Controllers
concepts.description: Controllers specific to List View functionality (filtering, export, selection)

concepts.name: Object View Controllers
concepts.description: Controllers for Object Views (ListView and DetailView) with optional type parameters

concepts.name: Target Properties
concepts.description: Properties that control controller activation scope (view type, object type, nesting, etc.)

concepts.name: View Controller
concepts.description: Controllers activated for specific views to implement data-aware features

concepts.name: Window Controller
concepts.description: Controllers activated at window level for managing window-specific functionality

concepts.name: Collection Property Editors
concepts.description: Editors displaying collections or reference properties in nested views

concepts.name: Lookup Property Editors
concepts.description: Editors for reference/foreign key properties with lookup functionality

concepts.name: Mail Merge
concepts.description: Feature for generating documents from templates and data

concepts.name: Office Module
concepts.description: Module providing Rich Text and Spreadsheet property editors for document editing

concepts.name: Property Editor Customization
concepts.description: Creating, registering, and customizing property editors

concepts.name: Property Editor Features
concepts.description: Value formatting and display features for property editors

concepts.name: Property Editor Types
concepts.description: Core property editor implementation classes and patterns

synonyms: Data Types Supported by built-in Editors

concepts.name: Property Editors
concepts.description: UI controls used in Detail Views to display and edit individual business object properties, with built-in and custom editor support

concepts.name: Specialized Property Editors
concepts.description: Advanced editors for complex data types (rich text, images, files, criteria)

concepts.name: Spreadsheet Control
concepts.description: Embedded spreadsheet control for Excel-like data editing

concepts.name: Standard Property Editors
concepts.description: Built-in editors for basic data types (string, numeric, date, boolean, enum)

concepts.name: Accordion Control
concepts.description: Accordion-style collapsible panel control

concepts.name: Layout
concepts.description: Detail View layout arrangement system for organizing UI elements (Layout Items and Layout Groups)

concepts.name: Layout Generation
concepts.description: Automatic generation of layout structure based on business object properties

concepts.name: Layout Runtime Customization
concepts.description: Runtime and design-time modification of view layout by end users and administrators

concepts.name: List Editors
concepts.description: Controls used by List Views to visualize and interact with object collections, including grid, tree, and specialized data presentation formats

concepts.name: Tree List
concepts.description: Hierarchical list view for displaying parent-child relationships

concepts.name: Navigation
concepts.description: Application navigation and menu system

concepts.name: Tabbed MDI Interface
concepts.description: Multi-document interface with tabbed windows

concepts.name: Application Templates
concepts.description: Built-in controls that define the appearance and layout of windows and frames in XAF applications

concepts.name: Conditional Appearance
concepts.description: Rule-based dynamic UI styling and visibility

concepts.name: SVG Graphics
concepts.description: Using SVG vector graphics in XAF applications

concepts.name: Theming
concepts.description: Applying and customizing themes and visual styles

concepts.name: Context Menus
concepts.description: Right-click context menus and contextual actions

concepts.name: Error Styling
concepts.description: Customizing how validation errors are displayed

concepts.name: Filtering UI
concepts.description: User interface for filtering data in lists and grids

concepts.name: Inline Editing
concepts.description: Inline and batch editing functionality in grid views

concepts.name: Loading Indicators
concepts.description: Splash screens and loading indicators for better UX

concepts.name: Notifications
concepts.description: User notification and alert system

concepts.name: Charts
concepts.description: Data visualization and charting module

concepts.name: Dashboard View
concepts.description: View that displays multiple sub-views side-by-side in a single frame

concepts.name: Dashboard View Items
concepts.description: View items that display nested views within dashboard views

concepts.name: Dashboards
concepts.description: Interactive analytics and dashboard functionality

concepts.name: Detail View
concepts.description: Form view for viewing and editing a single object's properties

concepts.name: List View
concepts.description: Grid/table view for displaying and managing collections of objects

concepts.name: List View Data Access Modes
concepts.description: Modes that control how List Views load and process data (Client, Server, InstantFeedback, ServerView, DataView, InstantFeedbackView, Queryable)

concepts.name: Lookup View
concepts.description: Specialized list view for selecting related objects in lookups and references

concepts.name: Master-Detail Views
concepts.description: Views displaying a detail view alongside a nested list view

concepts.name: Nested Views
concepts.description: Views displayed within other views using nested frames

concepts.name: PivotGrid
concepts.description: OLAP pivot table analysis module

concepts.name: Recurring Events
concepts.description: Implementing recurring event patterns in scheduler

concepts.name: Report Parameters
concepts.description: Defining and using parameters in XtraReports

concepts.name: Reports
concepts.description: Report generation and design module

concepts.name: Reports V2
concepts.description: Next-generation reporting module with enhanced features

concepts.name: Scheduler
concepts.description: Calendar and event scheduling module

concepts.name: Static View Items
concepts.description: View items for displaying static text and images in views

concepts.name: View Customization
concepts.description: Customizing view behavior, appearance, and structure

concepts.name: View Items
concepts.description: UI components that can be displayed within composite views

concepts.name: View Lifecycle
concepts.description: View creation, activation, display, and lifecycle management

concepts.name: View Types
concepts.description: Core view implementation classes and types

concepts.name: View Variants
concepts.description: Runtime switching between multiple customized versions of the same view (ViewVariantsModule feature)

concepts.name: Views
concepts.description: UI components that display and edit business objects (List Views, Detail Views, Dashboard Views)

concepts.name: Frames
concepts.description: The Frame class represents the context of a window or view in an XAF application, providing access to controllers, templates, and other services. It is used to manage the lifecycle and behavior of views and their associated UI elements.

concepts.name: Popup Windows
concepts.description: Displaying views in popup windows or modal dialogs with ShowViewInPopupWindow method

concepts.name: Windows
concepts.description: The Window class represents a window in an XAF application, providing properties and events to manage its behavior, content, and interactions with views and controllers. It is a key component in defining the user interface and navigation structure of the application.
